prompt: First-person point of view (POV) holding a sleek futuristic smartphone in a premium grocery store. The phone screen shows a glowing teal and lime green interface scanning a glass jar of yogurt on a wooden shelf. Subtle holographic nutritional data charts (KBJU) float around the product in neon teal. Photorealistic style, cinematic lighting, soft bokeh background of a high-end supermarket. Cyberpunk accents with thin glowing light strips on the shelves. Color palette: warm wood, vibrant food colors, accented by FoodFlow signature teal and electric green glow. 8k resolution, highly detailed, vertical composition.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, words, watermark, logo, QR code, brand name, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy interface, low resolution, cartoon, illustration, red colors
notes: Used a POV (First-person) angle to make the 'scanning' action feel personal and immediate as per the post text.
Integrated the brand-specific teal/green glow as holographic data to represent the bot's output (KBJU).
Balanced the 'cyberpunk' requirement with 'premium lifestyle' by using warm wood textures and soft bokeh to avoid a dark/gritty sci-fi look.
Strictly excluded text and numbers to prevent AI-generated gibberish, focusing on 'data shapes' and 'charts' instead.
